items.headline: Pittsburgh Penguins out of element in physical Game 1 loss
items.description: PITTSBURGH -- Evgeni Malkin knows the Pittsburgh Penguins, in and out.

items.headline: Philadelphia Flyers Pittsburgh Penguins Game 1 recap April 18, 2026
items.description: PITTSBURGH -- Travis Sanheim scored the go-ahead goal in the third period, lifting the Philadelphia Flyers to a 3-2 win against the Pittsburgh Penguins in Game 1 of the Eastern Conference First Round at PPG Paints Arena on Saturday.

items.headline: Erik Cernak, Juraj Slafkovsky put friendship aside for Lightning Canadiens playoff series
items.description: TAMPA -- At the 2026 Milano Cortina Olympics, Erik Cernak shared a room at the athletes village with his Slovakia teammate, Juraj Slafkovsky. In the first round of the Stanley Cup Playoffs in the Eastern Conference, Cernak will once again find himself on the ice with Slafkovsky, but the two

items.headline: 2026 Stanley Cup Playoffs first round schedule television results
items.description:
The 2026 Stanley Cup Playoffs are underway, with three games played Saturday.
Here is the complete schedule for the first round of the playoffs, including TV information and results:

items.headline: Jesper Wallstedt sparkles in playoff debut for Minnesota Wild
items.description:
DALLAS -- Jesper Wallstedt may have looked like he was at ease as he strolled into American Airlines Center on Saturday and geared up for his Stanley Cup Playoff debut.
Looks, in this case, were without a doubt deceiving.
"No, I was definitely nervous," the Minnesota Wild's 23-year-old rookie goalie

items.headline: Minnesota Wild Dallas Stars Game 1 recap April 18 2026
items.description: DALLAS -- Matt Boldy and Joel Eriksson Ek each had two goals and an assist, and the Minnesota Wild defeated the Dallas Stars 6-1 in Game 1 of the Western Conference First Round at American Airlines Center on Saturday.

items.headline: Lukas Dostal Connor Ingram goalie matchup in Western Conference First Round
items.description: Goaltending is an integral part of the Stanley Cup Playoffs. To better understand the strengths and weaknesses of each goaltender, NHL.com charted 100 goals against each goaltender late in the regular season to see what patterns emerge. items.headline: Jordan Staal shows right way for Carolina Hurricanes in Game one win
items.description:
RALEIGH, N.C. -- For the better part of three hours Saturday, it was nearly impossible not to notice Jordan Staal of the Carolina Hurricanes.
Forget that he is 6-foot-4 and 220 pounds, often towering above others on the ice. Rather, it is that he proved again he is a man

items.headline: Ottawa Senators Carolina Hurricanes Game 1 recap April 18 2026
items.description: RALEIGH, N.C. -- Frederik Andersen made 22 saves, and the Carolina Hurricanes defeated the Ottawa Senators 2-0 in Game 1 of the Eastern Conference First Round at Lenovo Center on Saturday.

items.headline: Pittsburgh Philadelphia mayors make friendly wager
items.description:
Apparently bragging rights aren’t enough when it comes to the Battle of Pennsylvania.
Before the Pittsburgh Penguins and Philadelphia Flyers drop the puck in their Eastern Conference First Round matchup on Saturday (8 p.m. ET; ESPN, SN, TVAS, SN-PIT, NBCSP), Pittsburgh mayor Corey O'Connor and Philadelphia mayor Cherelle Parker agreed

items.headline: Anaheim Ducks super juiced for first round against Edmonton Oilers
items.description:
IRVINE, Calif. -- Joel Quenneville was among those who had an extra jump in his step for the Anaheim Ducks on Saturday.
The Ducks coach could sense the excitement when his team convened at Great Ice Park for their final practice before departing for their first Stanley Cup Playoff appearance
